title: clarification_interaction_schema_v1_0_0
description: Schema for Class 2 clarification interaction artifacts: bounded candidate choices, presentation channel, user/caregiver selection, timeout/no-response result, and transition target. This schema does not define pure context input, validator approval, actuation command, doorlock authorization, or emergency trigger authority. Optional fixture metadata fields are allowed for integration-test artifacts but do not create operational authority. For timeout/no-response artifacts, candidate_choices should preserve the choices that were presented or pending at the time of timeout so that timeout outcomes remain auditable.

payload_family.description: Optional fixture/runtime metadata describing the clarification interaction payload family. This field is not policy authority.

schema_ref.description: Optional fixture metadata pointing to this schema.

clarification_id.description: Unique identifier for this clarification interaction.

audit_correlation_id.description: Correlation ID linking this clarification interaction to audit logs and upstream events.

source_scenario.description: Optional scenario identifier when this payload is used in integration fixtures or tests.

source_layer.description: System layer that created or updated this clarification interaction artifact. caregiver_confirmation_backend may update the artifact when caregiver confirmation provides selection evidence, but this does not create autonomous actuation authority.

unresolved_reason.description: Machine-readable reason for entering or remaining in Class 2 clarification.

candidate_choices.description: Bounded choices that may be presented to the user/caregiver for confirmation. Candidate choices are guidance only and do not authorize actuation. For timeout/no-response artifacts, this array should preserve the choices that were presented or pending at the time of timeout.

presentation_channel.description: Channel used to present candidate choices or clarification prompt.

selection_result.description: Result of user/caregiver selection. Omit when no selection has been collected yet.

transition_target.description: Resulting transition target after confirmation, deterministic evidence, timeout, or pending state.

timestamp_ms.description: Creation or update timestamp in epoch milliseconds.

notes.description: Optional fixture or implementation note. Notes are not operational authority.
